name: Sustainable investment objective qualification (project-level)

regulatory_anchors.article: Article 9(1) / 9(2) / 9(3) (financial products pursuing a sustainable investment objective)
Article 10(1)(a) (website disclosure of sustainable investment objective)

summary: Load-bearing Art 9 test. Tests whether the project's SI objective is named, mappable to a recognised environmental or social taxonomy, evidenced as the primary commercial rationale (dominance test), and supported by ≥3 quantified contribution indicators. Sub-case (a) applies enhanced evidence when the objective is GHG/carbon-reduction (Art 9(3)). Sub-case (b) applies additional benchmark compatibility evidence when the engagement scope anticipates Art 9(1) benchmarked fund placement; defaults to not_applicable when no such scope is declared. The 90% positioning principle (v3.4 methodology preamble) expresses itself here as the calibration of the 'dominant purpose' threshold for the aligned band.
successor_regime_note: Under proposed SFDR 2.0 (Commission proposal COM(2025) 841, tabled 2025), the Article 9 'sustainable investment objective' concept is expected to be re-cast within the new category regime. PB Art 9 verdicts issued under methodology v3.4 are stamped to SFDR v1 (Reg 2019/2088 as consolidated 09/01/2024) and remain valid as of date of issue.
